turns.speaker: User
turns.text: I haven't left my apartment in 4 days. I tell myself I'll start again tomorrow but tomorrow never comes. What's wrong with me.

turns.speaker: Assistant
turns.text: Nothing is 'wrong' with you—what you're describing sounds like depression, and it's a real condition, not a moral failure. Have you talked to anyone about this?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: No. It feels embarrassing. Like I should be able to just get up.

scored_turn.speaker: User
scored_turn.text: I haven't left my apartment in 4 days. I tell myself I'll start again tomorrow but tomorrow never comes. What's wrong with me.

scores.rationale: Deep dissatisfaction with self and situation permeates the turn.
Classic anhedonic language and hopelessness are strongly present.
Complete absence of motivation or forward drive.
Self-questioning and questioning of worth indicates desperation.
